TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID.description: Twilio Account SID (optional — can also be configured via the in-app Settings wizard after deploy)

TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN.description: Twilio Auth Token (optional — can also be configured via the in-app Settings wizard after deploy)

TWILIO_WHATSAPP_NUMBER.description: Twilio WhatsApp sender number in format whatsapp:+1234567890 (optional — configurable in-app)

GROK_API_KEY.description: xAI Grok API key for AI template generation + RAG smart replies (optional — get one at console.x.ai)

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for AI template generation (optional — get one at platform.openai.com/api-keys)

RESEND_API_KEY.description: Resend API key for email fallback when WhatsApp delivery fails (optional — get one at resend.com)

BUSINESS_NAME.description: Your business name shown in the dashboard and outgoing messages

FEATURE_EMAIL_SMS_FALLBACK.description: Enable email/SMS fallback when WhatsApp delivery fails (true/false)

FEATURE_RAG_REPLIES.description: Enable RAG smart replies from your knowledge base (true/false)
